error.signature: Access-Control-Allow-Origin cannot be wildcard when credentials flag is true

verdict.summary: Browsers reject CORS responses with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * when credentials are included.

dead_ends.why_fails: Browsers explicitly block this combination per spec.

dead_ends.action: Remove credentials mode to use wildcard
dead_ends.why_fails: Breaks authentication - cookies and auth headers will not be sent.

workarounds.action: Dynamically set Allow-Origin to the requesting origin after validation
workarounds.how: origin = req.headers.origin; if origin in ALLOWED: set header

workarounds.action: Use a CORS middleware that handles origin reflection
